full_text:
Prepare all the stock solutions inside the laminar and keep the final solution sterile

1). N-Acetyl-L-cysteine Cat no. A9165-100G, Sigma

Prepare stock solution 100mM: dissolve 1.6g of the powder in 100 mL MQ water. Once dissolved, filter through 0.2 µm filter, into 2x 50 ml tube. Store in the fridge.

Working solution 1mM: Add 1ml of 100mM in 99 ml of medium

2). Nicotinamide Cat no. N0636-500G, Sigma

Prepare stock solution 100mM: dissolve 6,87 g of the powder in 100 mL MQ water. Once dissolved, filter through 0.2 µm filter, into 2x 50 ml tube. Store in the fridge.

Working solution 5mM: Add 5ml of 100mM in 95 ml of medium

3). Y-27632 dihydrochloride Cat no. M1817 AbMoleBiosciences
Prepare stock solution 5mM: dissolve 10mg (whole bottle) of the powder in 8,086 mL DMSO. No need to filter this. Aliquot 500 uL per eppendorf. Store at -20.

Working solution 5uM: Add 100ul of 5mM in 100 ml of medium

4). Recombinant human FGF10 Cat no.100-26 Peprotech

Prepare stock solution 100ug/ml: Dissolve 25 µg in 250 µL sterile 0.1% BSA in DPBS (without Ca & Mg). Do not filter it aliquot into 50 ul per Eppendorf. Store at -20.

Working solution 10 ng/ml: Add 10ul of 100ug/ml in 100 ml of medium

5). Animal-Free Recombinant Human FGF-basic (154 a.a.) Cat no. AF-100-18B

Prepare stock solution 100ug/ml: Dissolve 50 µg (supplied) in 500 µL sterile 0.1% BSA in DPBS (without Ca & Mg). Do not filter it aliquot into 50 ul per Eppendorf. Store at -20.

Working solution 10 ng/ml: Add 10ul of 100ug/ml in 100 ml of medium

6). Animal-Free Recombinant Human EGF Cat no. AF-100-15 Peprotech

Prepare stock solution 100mg/ml: Dissolve 100 mg (1 mg supplied) in 1mL sterile 0.1% BSA in DPBS (without Ca & Mg). Do not filter it aliquot into 100 ul per Eppendorf. Store at -20.

Working solution 5 ng/ml: Add 5ul of 1mg/ml in 100 ml of medium

7). SB 202190 (inhibitor of p38 MAPK signaling, induced apoptosis in Jurkat cells)

Cat no. HY-10295 10mM in 1ml DMSO MedChemExpress

Aliquot 1mL stock solution into 100uL per eppendorf, store at -800C.

Working solution 3uM: Add 30 ul of stock in 100 ml of medium

8). A 83-01 (Smad /TGF-β signaling Inhibitor)

Cat no. SML0788-5MG Sigma/Merk

Prepare stock solution 10mM: Dissolve 0.042 g of the powder in 10 mL of DMSO. Aliquot 1mL stock solution per eppendorf, store at -800C.

Working 0.5 uM: dilute 5uL of stock in 100 mL medium

9). β-estradiol Cat no. E2758-1G Sigma/Merk

Prepare stock solution 10mM: Dissolve 0.027 g of the powder in 10 mL absolute alcohol. Aliquot 1mL stock solution per eppendorf, store at -800C.

Working 100 nM: dilute 1uL of stock in 100 mL medium

10). Hydrocortisone Cat no. H0888 Sigma/Merk

Prepare stock solution 1mg/mL: Dissolve 1mg of the powder in 10 mL of absolute alcohol. Aliquot 1mL stock solution per eppendorf, store at -800C.

Working solution 500 ng/mL: dilute 50uL of 1mg/mL stock in 100 mL medium

11). Forskolin (Adenylate cyclase activator, inhibitor of T cell lines proliferation)

Cat no. HY-15371 10mM in 1ml DMSO Medchem express. Aliquot 10mM stock solution into 100 uL per eppendorf. Store at -800C

Working solution 10µM: dilute 100uL of 10mM stock in 100mL medium

12). Recombinant Human Heregulinβ-1 Cat no. 100-03 Peprotech

Prepare stock solution 50ug/mL (6.6 uM): Dissolve 50ug of the powder in 1 mL of sterile 0.1% (w/v) BSA in DPBS (without Ca and Mg). Aliquot 100 uL stock solution per eppendorf, store at -800C.

Working solution 5 nM: dilute 76uL of stock in 100 mL medium

Converting Protein Mass Concentration to Molar Concentration, Or Vice Versa https://www.novateinbio.com/techinfo/protocols/Converting%20protein%20mass%20concentration%20to%20molar%20concentration,%20or%20vice%20versa.pdf

13). Recombinant Human IL-2 200-02 1 mg 1 Peprotech

Prepare stock solution 1mg/ml or 6.6 x107 Units /mL🡪centrifuge the vial, and dissolve in 1 mL 0.1% BSA in DPBS (without Ca and Mg). Aliquot 50 uL per tube, store at -80.

Working solution 500 IU/ml: 0,75 ul of stock solution on 100 mL of medium.

Or

Dilute 1mg/ml to 1 ug/ml🡪 1ul of stock+999 ul of 0.1% BSA/PBS

From this add 76 ul per 10 ml of the culture midium

14). Recombinant Human IL-7 cat no: 200-07 10 ug Peprotech

Prepare 100 ug / ml stock in sterile MQ water🡪 dissolve 10 ug in 100 ul of sterile MQ water. From this prepare working stock 10 ug/ml🡪 100 ul of 100ug/ml + 900 ul of sterile 0.1% BSA🡪 aliquot this as 50 ul per sterile 1.5 ml tube. Store at -80.

Working concentration 10 ng/ml🡪 add 10 ul of 10ug/ml working stock to 10 ml of organoid medium.

NOTE: Always add the IL-7 freshly before changing the medium.

15). Recombinant Human IL-15 cat no: 200-15 10 ug Peprotech

Prepare 100 ug / ml stock in sterile MQ water🡪 dissolve 10 ug in 100 ul of sterile MQ water. From this prepare working stock 10 ug/ml🡪 100 ul of 100ug/ml + 900 ul of sterile 0.1% BSA🡪 aliquot this as 50 ul per sterile 1.5 ml tube. Store at -80.

Working concentration 10 ng/ml🡪 add 10 ul of 10ug/ml working stock to 10 ml of organoid medium.

NOTE: Always add the IL-15 freshly before changing the medium.

14). Recombinant Human R-Spondin 1 Protein 25ug Cat no. 4645-RS R&D systems

Prepare stock solution 100 ug/ml by dissolving in 250 ul sterile 0.1% BSA in DPBS (without Ca and Mg)

Aliquot 20 uL per tube (1.5 ml sterile tube), store at -80.

Working solution, 100 ng/mL: 20uL stock in 20 mL medium.

15). Recombinant Human Noggin 20ug Cat no. 120-10C Peprotech

Prepare stock solution 100 ug/ml by dissolving in 200ul sterile 0.1% BSA in DPBS (without Ca and Mg)

Aliquot 20 uL per tube (1.5 ml sterile tube), store at -80.

Working solution, 100 ng/mL: 20uL stock in 20 mL medium.
